subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath guided us and you unto His straight path and hath taught us that which preserveth us from Satan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی هدانا و ایاکم الی صراطه المستقیم و علمنا ما یحفظنا عن الشیطان
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
